title: Liberty Primary Metals Australia Pty Ltd — Regulatory action
investigation_objective: Named in ASIC media release 25-141MR (and the preceding 25-113MR) as a GFG Alliance Group company subject to Supreme Court of NSW orders over alleged failure to lodge annual financial reports.
scope: Subject of Supreme Court of NSW civil proceedings (commenced June 2025) and consent orders (21 August 2025) over alleged failure to lodge its FY2024 annual report, per 25-141MR/25-113MR; Reported to be in voluntary administration as of a subsequent ASIC published notice
